title: Replace verifier-economy and replay-capsule trust surrogates with canonical signed capsule verifier
artifact_scope: Support-bead evidence pack for the current external replay, quarantine, scoreboard, fraud-proof witness, artifact-level coherence verification state, and explicit rch tractability benchmark state after capturing representative PASS replay and trust-score lanes on the current shared tree.

verification_steps.name: python_check_verifier_economy_json
verification_steps.detail: 152/152 checks passed on 2026-03-09. Replacement-critical guard windows for attestation signature verification, cached-key verification, and replay-capsule integrity all passed.

verification_steps.name: python_check_verifier_sdk_json
verification_steps.detail: 65/65 checks passed on 2026-03-09. Replacement-critical guard windows for canonical migration signature verification and content-hash validation both passed.

verification_steps.name: python_unittest_verifier_regression_suite
verification_steps.detail: 74 tests passed in 0.223s. Includes regression mutations that fail on signature-present and hash-present shortcut reintroduction.

verification_steps.name: python_check_verifier_replay_operator_e2e_json
verification_steps.detail: 17/17 checks passed on 2026-03-09. The operator E2E bundle reports a single coherent trace id, five passing stages, complete CAPSULE_VERIFY_* / VERIFIER_SCORE_* coverage, and valid stage artifact paths.

verification_steps.name: python_unittest_operator_e2e_checker
verification_steps.detail: 9 tests passed in 0.110s. Confirms the operator E2E checker continues to require the normalized passing bundle shape.

verification_steps.name: python_check_bd_1z5a_evidence_pack_json
verification_steps.detail: 28/28 checks passed on 2026-03-11. Confirms replacement-gap artifact paths, current support-shard metadata, fixture ids, operator bundle/log linkage, fraud-proof witness references, canonical summary markdown, tractability benchmark build IDs/durations, and stale-gap text defenses remain coherent.

verification_steps.name: python_check_bd_1z5a_evidence_pack_self_test
verification_steps.detail: Internal mutation self-test passed on 2026-03-10. The synthetic stale-gap regression still forces a FAIL verdict as expected.

verification_steps.name: python_unittest_bd_1z5a_evidence_pack
verification_steps.detail: 13 tests passed on 2026-03-11. Covers missing artifact references, missing required fixture ids, tractability-benchmark fixture loss, tractability-budget regressions, fraud-proof mismatches, stale-gap text regression, and markdown drift mutations.

verification_steps.name: python_py_compile_bd_1z5a_evidence_pack
verification_steps.detail: Syntax-only compile sanity passed on 2026-03-10 for the evidence-pack coherence checker and its regression suite.

verification_steps.name: rch_external_replay_verification_tractability
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data/tmp CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_navyriver_bd1z5a14_match_u2 cargo test -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces test_replay_capsule_match --lib -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: Completed remotely with exit_code=0 in 475466ms on worker vmi1149989. Provides explicit tractability evidence for the representative external replay verification lane on the current shared tree.

verification_steps.detail: Completed remotely with exit_code=0 in 465686ms on worker vmi1149989. Provides explicit tractability evidence for the representative trust-score update lane on the current shared tree.

verification_steps.name: rch_exact_verifier_name_probes
commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_browncove_bd1z5a2_capsule cargo test -p frankenengine-node --lib test_register_replay_capsule_rejects_tampered_integrity_hash -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_browncove_bd1z5a2_anchor cargo test -p frankenengine-node --lib test_verify_trust_state_timing_safe_anchor_comparison -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: Exploratory exact-name probes were cancelled once enough build evidence existed for the support artifact pack. Both had already reached the shared dependency compilation path, which currently emits unrelated franken_engine warning noise in this worktree.

acceptance_coverage: Replacement-critical checker windows now fail if verifier-economy or connector verifier paths regress to signature-present or hash-present shortcut acceptance.

The current shared frankenengine-node tree now has explicit rch tractability evidence for one representative external replay verification lane and one representative trust-score update lane, both recorded with build IDs and durations in artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-1z5a/rch_tractability_benchmarks.json.
Deterministic replay and scoreboard evidence already exist at the section-10.17 layer via the universal capsule report and public trust scoreboard snapshot.
Rust conformance tests exist for the capsule report and scoreboard report, and the replacement-gap fixture index links them as reusable external-verification inputs.
The replacement-gap operator shell harness now exists under tests/e2e and produces a passing operator bundle with the required CAPSULE_VERIFY_* and VERIFIER_SCORE_* event families.
A machine-readable fraud-proof witness bundle now records the successful capsule_verify_fraud_proof stage, stable fraud_proof_id, trace binding, and source artifact references.

The replacement-gap evidence pack now has a first-class coherence checker that fails on missing artifact references, missing required fixture ids, operator bundle/log/fraud witness drift, tractability benchmark drift or budget regressions, summary markdown drift, and stale gap language regressions.
outstanding_gaps: The parent bead remains in progress on the reserved core verifier Rust surfaces owned in other lanes.
This support artifact pack does not independently certify that the canonical verifier kernel implementation is complete; it records the external evidence state around the current shared tree.
notes: This artifact pack is intentionally partial and support-scoped: it captures the truthful current state of verifier evidence while bd-1z5a core implementation work continues elsewhere.

The current replay fixture inventory now includes the dedicated replacement-gap operator harness, checker, structured log, witness-reference bundle, tractability benchmark report, and evidence-pack coherence checker in addition to the section-10.17 reports and conformance tests.

This refresh records the bd-1z5a.14 tractability proof alongside the older bd-1z5a.9 coherence guard so downstream reviewers can discover both directly from the pack itself rather than only from thread history.

The earlier bd-1z5a.2 gap statements about missing operator shell coverage, missing CAPSULE_VERIFY_* / VERIFIER_SCORE_* markers, and a missing fraud-proof bundle are now obsolete and have been replaced by concrete artifact paths in this refreshed pack.
